description: DDC is about to load 1/2 scripts with pool size = 1000 ddc_module_loader.js:1015
regression_tests: N/A: report captured normal Flutter DDC startup output, not a product defect
root_cause: Not a real bug. The description is standard Flutter web DDC (Dart Dev Compiler) startup output — normal logs from running in debug/DDC mode. The terminal_output showed a working REPL session with no double-echo or errors. User mistakenly included DDC console output as the bug description.
notes: Platform macOS:web. The REPL was functioning correctly at time of report.
